# Receiz Conformance Center

This repo-local hub vendors the six live suites from [receiz.com/conformance](https://receiz.com/conformance) into durable docs that are easy to reference in code review, audits, and product docs.

The badges below stay live. The tables and suite breakdowns on this page are pinned to the imported snapshot set `2026-03-28`, generated between `2026-03-28T00:42:58.408Z` and `2026-03-28T00:43:07.163Z`.

This ordering follows the official [Powered by Receiz](https://receiz.com/powered-by) guidance: brand provenance first, then verification, settlement, identity, issuance, interoperability, and world conformance.

## What Is Tested

| Suite | Coverage | Deep docs | Snapshot |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | Runtime and source controls for OIDC authorization, token exchange, introspection, revocation, and Connect scope-enforcement contracts. | [deep doc](identity.md) | [raw snapshot](snapshots/2026-03-28/identity.conformance.json) |
| Issuance | Runtime and source controls for WireProof issuance, AssetSeal custody issuance, and signer enrollment/signing contract integrity. | [deep doc](issuance.md) | [raw snapshot](snapshots/2026-03-28/issuance.conformance.json) |
| Verification | Runtime and source controls for verification contracts, trusted signature policy, artifact validation, and deterministic verdict behavior. | [deep doc](verification.md) | [raw snapshot](snapshots/2026-03-28/verification.conformance.json) |
| Settlement | Runtime and source controls for deterministic settlement behavior, replay fields, conversion rules, and ledger continuity contracts. | [deep doc](settlement.md) | [raw snapshot](snapshots/2026-03-28/settlement.conformance.json) |
| Interoperability | Runtime and source controls for external interface contracts across payment embeds, note-claim embeds, scheduler embed flows, and booking policy gates. | [deep doc](interoperability.md) | [raw snapshot](snapshots/2026-03-28/interoperability.conformance.json) |
| World | Runtime and source controls for Receiz World and Public Twin contracts across public routes, disclosure/provenance, promotion gates, and canonical pipeline guarantees. | [deep doc](world.md) | [raw snapshot](snapshots/2026-03-28/world.conformance.json) |

## Included Files

- [index.json](index.json): machine-readable summary for all six suites, their live endpoints, and the imported snapshot metadata.
- [identity.md](identity.md): full Identity suite coverage, family breakdown, requirement-to-check map, and check inventory.
- [issuance.md](issuance.md): full Issuance suite coverage, family breakdown, requirement-to-check map, and check inventory.
- [verification.md](verification.md): full Verification suite coverage, family breakdown, requirement-to-check map, and check inventory.
- [settlement.md](settlement.md): full Settlement suite coverage, family breakdown, requirement-to-check map, and check inventory.
- [interoperability.md](interoperability.md): full Interoperability suite coverage, family breakdown, requirement-to-check map, and check inventory.
- [world.md](world.md): full World suite coverage, family breakdown, requirement-to-check map, and check inventory.
- [snapshots/2026-03-28](snapshots/2026-03-28): exact pretty-printed JSON imported from the live conformance endpoints.

## Notes

- The badge image for each suite is live and served directly from Receiz.
- The written metrics in this repo reflect the imported JSON snapshot above, not a continuously streaming view.
- Each suite page below maps requirements to the underlying checks so a reader can see both what is enforced and how it is evidenced.
